description: 🔍 Find usernames across 400+ social networks. Check if a username is available or already taken on various platforms. | 🔍 在 400+ 社交网络中查找用户名，检查用户名是否可用或已被占用。

properties.title: 用户名 | Username
properties.name: username
properties.description: Username to search across social networks. | 要搜索的用户名

properties.title: 超时时间(秒) | Timeout (secs)
properties.name: timeout
properties.description: Request timeout in seconds per site. | 每个站点的请求超时秒数

properties.title: 最大并发数 | Concurrency
properties.name: maxConcurrency
properties.description: Maximum concurrent requests. | 最大并发请求数

properties.title: 包含 NSFW 站点 | Include NSFW
properties.name: includeNsfw
properties.description: Include adult content sites in search. | 是否包含成人内容站点

properties.title: 显示所有结果 | Show All Results
properties.name: printAll
properties.description: Show all results including not found. | 显示所有结果包括未找到的

properties.title: 指定站点 | Specific Sites
properties.name: sites
properties.description: Only check these sites (empty = all sites). | 只检查这些站点（空=所有站点）
